recommendations.title: WILL
recommendations.overview: Two young police officers find themselves torn between collaboration and resistance as they navigate the Nazi-occupied Antwerp during World War II.
A young British soldier must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.

recommendations.title: Kajaki
recommendations.overview: British soldiers guarding the Kajaki Dam set out to rescue a three-man team after one of them loses a leg to a landmine.

recommendations.title: Sand Castle
recommendations.overview: Set during the occupation of Iraq, a squad of U.S. soldiers try to protect a small village.

recommendations.title: The Last of the Mohicans
recommendations.overview: In war-torn colonial America, in the midst of a bloody battle between British, the French and Native American allies, the aristocratic daughter of a British Colonel and her party are captured by a group of Huron warriors. Fortunately, a group of thre

recommendations.title: Fortress
recommendations.overview: The story revolves around a top-secret resort for retired U.S. intelligence officers. A group of criminals led by Balzary breach the compound, hellbent on revenge on Robert, forcing the retired officer and his son to save the day.

recommendations.title: Sisu
recommendations.overview: When an ex-soldier who discovers gold in the Lapland wilderness tries to take the loot into the city, German soldiers led by a brutal SS officer battle him.

recommendations.title: Beanpole
recommendations.overview: 1945, Leningrad. World War II has devastated the city, demolishing its buildings and leaving its citizens in tatters, physically and mentally. Two young women, Iya and Masha, search for meaning and hope in the struggle to rebuild their lives amongst

recommendations.title: Waterloo Bridge
recommendations.overview: On the eve of World War II, a British officer revisits Waterloo Bridge and recalls the young man he was at the beginning of World War I and the young ballerina he met just before he left for the front.

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.
